# Dialog
<!-- nib-component: v1 | generated: 2026-03-02 | do not edit manually -->

> A modal overlay that requires user interaction before the rest of the UI becomes accessible

**Widget type:** `dialog`
**WAI-ARIA APG:** [dialog pattern](https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/dialog-modal/)

---

## Anatomy

| Part | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `root` | The dialog element itself (role=dialog) |
| `backdrop` | The semi-transparent overlay behind the dialog |
| `header` | The title bar area containing the dialog title and close button |
| `title` | The dialog’s heading (referenced by aria-labelledby) |
| `body` | The main content area |
| `footer` | Action buttons area |
| `closeButton` | The X button to dismiss the dialog |

---

## States

| State | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `closed` | Dialog is hidden and inert |
| `open` | Dialog is visible and focus is trapped within |
| `focused` | A focusable element within the dialog has focus (focus ring) |

---

## Variants

- `default` — Standard dialog with backdrop
- `drawer` — Panel that slides in from an edge (still a modal dialog)
- `alert` — Alert dialog requiring an explicit user decision (role=alertdialog)
## Accessibility

**ARIA role:** `dialog`
**Focus behavior:** focus-trap
**Focus trap:** Yes
**Focus returns to:** trigger-element  
**Required label:** Yes (aria-labelledby-pointing-to-title)
**Touch target minimum:** 44pt iOS / 48dp Android / 24px web

### Keyboard Interaction

| Key | Behavior |
|-----|----------|
| `Tab` | Move focus to the next focusable element within the dialog |
| `Shift+Tab` | Move focus to the previous focusable element within the dialog |
| `Escape` | Closes the dialog and returns focus to the trigger element |

### ARIA Attributes

- `aria-modal`
- `aria-labelledby`
- `aria-describedby`
- `aria-label`

---

```json
{
  "root": {
    "open": {
      "background": "dialog.bg",
      "border-radius": "dialog.radius",
      "shadow": {
        "offsetX": "0px",
        "offsetY": "8px",
        "blur": "24px",
        "spread": "0px",
        "color": "{color.shadow.default}"
      }
    }
  },
  "backdrop": {
    "open": {
      "background": "dialog.backdrop"
    }
  }
}
```
